summary: tail validates its resource argument against tailKnownResources() and exits 2 on an unknown resource.
reason: The generated framework tail command polled /<resource> for an unknown name and hung forever instead of failing fast; live dogfood error_path caught the hang.
validated_outcome: tail bogus-resource exits 2; live dogfood error_path passes.
upstream_issue: framework: tail should validate resource + not assume /<resource> REST paths (retro candidate)
